parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "html": "{{$json.content}}",
  "pageType": "blog",
  "improvements": ["seo", "readability", "structure", "wordpress-safety"],
  "targetKeyword": "{{$json.articleTopic}}",
  "siteUrl": "{{$json.siteUrl}}",
  "businessName": "{{$json.businessName}}",
  "productsJson": "{{$json.productsJson}}",
  "language": "he",
  "direction": "rtl",
  "rules": {
    "inlineCssOnly": true,
    "noStyleBlocks": true,
    "noClasses": true,
    "detailsSummaryAccordions": true,
    "tocNearTop": true,
    "faqSeparateAccordions": true,
    "noNumberedTocFaq": true,
    "faqBeforeAuthor": true,
    "authorSectionFinal": true,
    "hoverViaOnmouseover": true,
    "floatingBackToTop": true,
    "noFloatingWhatsapp": true,
    "noH1Tag": true,
    "wordpressSafe": true,
    "noDateLabels": true,
    "noBreadcrumbs": true
  }
}

={
  "title": "{{$node['Prepare for WordPress'].json.title}}",
  "content": "{{$node['Prepare for WordPress'].json.content}}",
  "url": "{{$json.link}}",
  "platforms": ["facebook", "instagram"],
  "language": "he",
  "businessName": "{{$node['Parse Document'].json.businessName}}",
  "siteUrl": "{{$node['Parse Document'].json.siteUrl}}"
}
